# AICOYO

> AI-powered voice agent infrastructure. Design, deploy, and monitor voice agents with enterprise telephony, RAG, and live tooling.

AICOYO provides a platform for building production-grade AI voice agents. The Journal publishes essays, rollout notes, and field reports from teams shipping voice AI.

## Blog — AICOYO Journal

### Operations
- [Launching Voice Ops Without Creating Another Ops Team](http://localhost:5173/blog/launching-voice-ops-without-chaos/): The first production risk in voice AI is not model quality. It is operational sprawl across telephony, prompts, tools, e...

### Architecture
- [From Scripted Bots to Tool-Driven Agents](http://localhost:5173/blog/from-scripted-bots-to-tool-driven-agents/): The jump from IVR logic to real call agents happens when the system can safely read context, trigger actions and recover...

### Launch
- [Designing Escalation Rails Before Launch](http://localhost:5173/blog/designing-escalation-rails-before-launch/): Escalation should not be the emergency plan you remember after the first failed call. It should be designed before the f...

## Pages
- [Blog](http://localhost:5173/blog/): Essays and field reports
- [Docs](http://localhost:5173/docs/): Documentation
- [Security](http://localhost:5173/security/): Security disclosures
- [Privacy](http://localhost:5173/privacy/): Privacy policy
- [Terms](http://localhost:5173/terms/): Terms of service
- [Imprint](http://localhost:5173/imprint/): Legal imprint
